CheckTitle: IAM password policy requires passwords to expire
Description: Huawei Cloud IAM password policies can enforce password expiration. It is recommended that the password validity period be set to a non-zero value so that passwords must be rotated periodically, reducing the window of opportunity for compromised credentials.
Risk: Without password expiration, compromised passwords can be used indefinitely. Passwords that never expire increase the risk of long-term credential exposure, especially if credentials are leaked but not detected immediately.

Code.Other:
1. Log on to the Huawei Cloud console.
2. Choose IAM & Security.
3. Click the Password Policy tab.
4. Set Password Validity Period to a non-zero value (e.g., 90 days).
5. Click OK.

Recommendation.Text: Configure the IAM password policy to require password expiration by setting a non-zero password validity period.
